meaning: 1. counterpoint (in music etc); 2. to align; 3. alignment
sentence: 音乐老师讲解了对位的基本技法。
pinyin: Yīnyuè lǎoshī jiǎngjiě le duìwèi de jīběn jìfǎ.
english: The music teacher explained the basic techniques of counterpoint.

sentence: 密码要求至少包含一个小写字母。
pinyin: Mì mǎ yāo qiú zhì shǎo bāo hán yī gè xiǎo xiě zì mǔ.
english: The password must contain at least one lowercase letter.

sentence: 这篇文章对这个问题有详细的论述。
pinyin: Zhè piān wénzhāng duì zhège wèntí yǒu xiángxì de lùn shù.
english: This article contains a detailed discussion of this issue.

meaning: 1. to enroll new students; 2. to get students
english: The school enrolls new students every fall.

meaning: 1. to turn around in one's hands; 2. to play with; 3. to fiddle w
sentence: 他喜欢把玩各种古董小物件。
pinyin: Tā xǐhuān bǎwán gè zhǒng gǔdǒng xiǎo wùjiàn.
english: He enjoys fiddling with all kinds of small antique items.
